If you need **24/7 emergency garage door repair in the East Bay (California)** , here are several companies that advertise round-the-clock or emergency service:

  * R&S Overhead Garage Door, Inc. — Serves San Leandro, Oakland, and surrounding East Bay communities with 24/7 emergency repair, installation, and maintenance services. [Expert Garage Door Company in San Leandro, CA | R&S Overhead](https://rsdoors.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Integrity Garage Doors & Gates — East Bay-based company offering 24/7 emergency service and same-day repairs throughout the Bay Area. [Bay Area Garage Door & Gate Repair | 24/7 Same-Day Service](https://integritygd.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Bay Area Garage Door Service Areas | Integrity GD](https://integritygd.com/locations/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Nor-Cal Overhead — Provides 24-hour emergency garage door repair for residential and commercial doors across the Bay Area, including the East Bay. [24 Hour Emergency Service | Nor-Cal Overhead | Bay Area, CA](https://www.norcaloverheaddoor.com/services/24-hour-emergency-service/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Residential Garage Door Services | Nor-Cal Overhead | Bay Area, CA](https://www.norcaloverheaddoor.com/services/residential-garage-doors/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Same Day Garage Door Repair — Advertises 24/7 emergency dispatch for issues such as broken springs, off-track doors, and doors that won't open or close. [Same Day Garage Door Repair — 24/7 Bay Area Service](https://www.samedaygd.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Olive Garage Doors — Family-owned company offering 24/7 emergency garage door repair and same-day service throughout the Bay Area. [Garage Door Repair Bay Area | Olive Garage Doors](https://www.olivegaragedoors.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Golden State Garage Doors & Gates — Provides emergency garage door repair and related services across Berkeley, Oakland, Alameda, Richmond, and other East Bay communities with 24/7 availability. [Berkeley, CA Leading Garage and Gate Services Company | Golden State Garage Doors & Gates](https://goldenstategarageandgates.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If your garage door is **stuck open, off-track, has a broken spring, or is trapping a vehicle** , most of these companies specifically list those situations as emergencies and offer after-hours dispatch. [Same Day Garage Door Repair — 24/7 Bay Area Service](https://www.samedaygd.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[24 Hour Emergency Service | Nor-Cal Overhead | Bay Area, CA](https://www.norcaloverheaddoor.com/services/24-hour-emergency-service/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you tell me your **East Bay city** (Oakland, Berkeley, Fremont, Walnut Creek, Concord, etc.), I can narrow this down to the closest options.
